case_title: VIRGINIA MARIN MIRANDA VS. ADRIAN A. OMARA MONTALVO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2019 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARIN MIRANDA, VIRGINIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
